title: Operationistic Grasslands: A Radical-Remainder Quotient Structure on ℕ
description: A Lean 4 / Mathlib4 formalization of Operationistic Grasslands, a family of algebraic structures on the natural numbers built from idempotent arithmetic projections, with the radical remainder r_n(a) = a - floor(a^(1/n))^n as the canonical projection. The development covers the per-chapter ring/field structure, the inter-chapter translation geometry (First Jump Theorem, Capitolar Groupoid, Universal Tiling Decomposition), the global grassland / flat-limit deformation theory (Keystone and Synchronization theorems), the infinite radical profile structure Aod-infinity and the Tower Separation Theorem, and the universal radical quotient Aod-star. Fully verified in Lean except for two intentionally documented sorries (the Hardy-Wright weak-zero density and the Catalan-Mihailescu constraint, the latter awaiting a Mathlib4 port).
